token.title: Grab Food — Browser Token
token.description:
Open **[food.grab.com](https://food.grab.com)** in your browser and log in.

Then press **F12** → **Application** tab → **Local Storage** → `https://food.grab.com` and copy the value of the `access_token` key.

The token is a long string starting with `eyJ…`.

data.refresh_token: Refresh token (optional — leave blank if not available)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Grab servers. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_token: The token was rejected by Grab. Make sure you copied the full `access_token` value.
error.invalid_otp: Invalid OTP code. Please try again.
error.otp_send_failed: Grab rejected the OTP request. Check the phone number and country code.

abort.already_configured: This Grab account is already configured.
